info.title: Production Order
info.description: In addition to create, read, and update production orders, you can, for example, release, schedule, technically complete, close, lock, print, and cost them, as well as set the deletion flag and check the material availability. Furthermore, the service contains associations to the following entities: order item, order sequence, order operation, order component, serial number, operation capacity, posting rule, and variant configuration. You can create, read, update, release, dispatch, and deallocate order operations.

x-sap-shortText: Create, read, and update production orders using this synchronous inbound service

x-sap-extensible.description:
If you are working with key user extensibility, the API can be extended by custom fields on the following business contexts (field usage for this API needs to be selected):
* Order Master Data (FINS_ORDER)
* Manufacturing: Order Operation (PP_ORDER_OPERATION)
* Reservation Document Item (RESERVATIONDOCUMENTITEM)

[How to add an extension field to an API](https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/0f69f8fb28ac4bf48d2b57b9637e81fa/ce819b8557194ae0aa180ba4ac6a04de.html)
